ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the metric */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level of importance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "sample_data" TEXT /* Sample data for the metric */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "aggregation_type" TEXT /* Type of aggregation (e.g., average, sum, count) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES metric_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES metric_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level (e.g., important, critical, informational) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., compaction, flush) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric value was recorded */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., running, waiting) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., aligned, not-aligned, total) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task status */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the task */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the task */,
  "duration_seconds" REAL /* Duration of the task in seconds */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data written or processed in the task */,
  "input_data_size" REAL /* Size of the input data */,
  "output_data_size" REAL /* Size of the output data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_tasks_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_tasks_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES task_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_tasks_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., DBA, data engineer, system administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric or task */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric or task was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES metric_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold exceeded, system down) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., DBA, data engineer, system administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
